candidate_check.description: Windows Server 2025 must be configured to audit handle manipulation failures.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify Audit Handle Manipulation auditing is enabled: 

Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Advanced Audit Policy Configuration >> System Audit Policies >> Object Access >> Audit Handle Manipulation. 

If "Audit Handle Manipulation" is not set to "Failure", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Advanced Audit Policy Configuration >> System Audit Policies >> Object Access >> "Audit Handle Manipulation" with "Failure" selected.
title: Windows Server 2025 must be configured to audit handle manipulation failures.
